name: GrannyHop
short_description: The game "GrannyHop" is an arcade game where grandma jumps on a graveyard, passes difficult levels, collects bonuses and defeats obstacles. Addictive gameplay and colorful graphics.
detailed_description:
"GrannyHop" is an exciting arcade game where you control a grandmother who jumps on a pogo stick and overcomes various levels. The islands of levels have varying difficulty, from easy to difficult, and you must skillfully control grandma's jumps to get to the finish line. Grandma can find various bonuses along the way, as well as overcome obstacles. The pleasant graphics, addictive gameplay and original idea of the game make it fun for players of all ages.

- CONTROL GRANDMA WITH JUST THE MOUSE
- Challenging levels are waiting for you
- There are 8 levels waiting for you, which are not so easy to complete (the levels will be updated with subsequent updates)
